title: Strength plugin resource
description: Resource Pack for the strength plugin
body:
🛡️ StrengthResourcePack - The Official StrengthSMP Companion

This resource pack is specifically designed to enhance the StrengthSMP experience. It adds high quality custom models and textures for the core gameplay elements, transforming standard Minecraft items into mystical artifacts of power!

✨ Key Features
🗡️ The Strength Shard: Transforms the Knowledge Book into a custom-modeled magical artifact.
💎 Custom Model Data: Integrated flawlessly with the StrengthSMP plugin using ID 3000.
🔥 Visual Feedback: Makes your shards, bounties, and milestone items stand out from standard vanilla items.
🚀 Lightweight: Optimized for perfect performance without any FPS drops.
🛠️ How to use:
Download and Install: Add the .zip to your resourcepacks folder or set it as your server-wide resource pack.
Pair with Plugin: Install the StrengthSMP Plugin to see these custom items appear in-game through crafting or the /withdraw command.
